title: Recruitment for a Deputy Head of the Supply Team
body: "We have a vacancy for a Deputy Head of the Supply Team.  Job Title  Deputy Head of the Supply Team    Grade  SSO  Salary & Pension  £46,060 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  As Deputy Head of the Supply Team, you will be responsible for overseeing the assessment of product literature, the production of public assessment reports, assessment of applications submitted under the Special Import Scheme and management of supply issue notifications.  You will line manage four team members to ensure continued delivery of application work in accordance with VMD’s Published Standards and internal targets.  How to apply  You must make your application via Deputy Head of the Supply Team - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  17 November 2025 "
